title: Update oscore_ctx_set_sender_seq to call NVM write_cb before setting initialized flag
description: Modify oscore_ctx_set_sender_seq() similar to persist_ssn logic: copy values under lock, call write_cb outside lock if registered, only set s_seq_initialized on successful write (or no callback). Return OSCORE_ERR_NVM_FAILED on write error. Update function docs.
